caption: Re-choreographed trapped_routing (new scenario order_mode staging key + all-teams-control scripting): the brittle infantry HOLDS its ground, breaks in the opening cavalry clash with half the regiment still standing, and the mob visibly detours around the impassable hill -- the westward track along the hill face and the turn north around the west corner -- while the blown cavalry peel off on diverging exits and the unit, still inside their reach when its rout timer expires, shatters and flees for good. Previously the unit auto-advanced out of position, was annihilated at the impact, and no detour ever appeared on screen.
